greeting.description: Social opening with no mental health content present

goodbye.description: Session closure with no mental health distress signals

gratitude.description: Expression of thanks with no mental health distress signals

asking_mental_health_question.description: Any mental health content, distress signal, or implicit cry for help
examples: how do i cope with depression

out_of_scope.description: Completely unrelated to mental health — no distress signals present
